name: Close-to-Wide Push Up Challenge
description: Push-up challenge alternating between close and wide grip, lifting hands off the ground to reposition between each rep.

exercises.name: Close-to-Wide Push-up
exercises.description: Alternate between close-grip and wide-grip push-ups, hands leave the floor to reposition between each rep.
exercises.notes: Explosive hand repositioning, maintain core tension throughout.

raw.caption: New Month, New Push Up Challenge. #militarywomen #pushups
raw.visualSummary: A woman in army camo performs dynamic push-ups alternating between close and wide hand positions, lifting hands off the ground to reposition between reps.
